query: Use list_active_participants to see who is in the all-hands VMR right now
note: positive — explicit MCP tool + operational verb

query: Use disconnect_participant to kick the echo in the board meeting
note: positive — explicit MCP tool + operational context

query: Use summarize_calls to show me today's call volume and quality
note: positive — explicit MCP tool + reporting task

query: Use lock_conference to lock the standup VMR immediately
note: positive — explicit MCP tool + operational verb

query: Use mute_participant to mute everyone in the conference except the presenter
Use list_alarms to check if there are any critical Pexip platform alarms
note: positive — explicit MCP tool + platform health

query: Use create_conference to add a new VMR called 'Sales Team' with a host PIN
note: positive — explicit MCP tool + admin task

query: How do I modify the pexip-command-api MCP tool source code to add a new endpoint?
note: negative — code modification task, belongs to pexip-command-api

query: How do I add a gateway_routing_rule via the Pexip configuration API?
note: negative — config development, belongs to pexip-config-api

query: How do I set up Pexip event sinks to receive webhook notifications?
note: negative — event config, belongs to pexip-event-sinks
